# Hyfe AI — Validation Study

> This page presents the clinical validation methodology and performance results for the Hyfe AI cough monitoring system. Hyfe uses continuous acoustic recording to automatically detect and count coughs, and this validation demonstrates agreement between Hyfe's automated counts and human-annotated ground truth across 23 participants in a multicenter study.

## About

- **Site:** https://validation.hyfe.com/
- **Publisher:** Hyfe AI — https://www.hyfe.com
- **Intended audience:** Pharmaceutical clinical development teams, biostatisticians, regulatory affairs professionals, and endpoints committee reviewers evaluating Hyfe as a digital endpoint instrument for respiratory clinical trials.

## Key Results

- Daily cough count CCC = **0.965** (Hyfe vs. human annotator, n=23, 24-hr recordings)
- Hourly Pearson r = **0.99** (95% CI 0.962–0.996; 477 person-hours)
- Hourly regression slope = 0.94 · intercept = 0.74
- Hourly mean bias = +0.23 coughs/hr · 95% LoA = −3.7 to +4.8 coughs/hr
- Hourly cough rate CCC = 0.963
- **Lin's LCCC (hourly coughs) = 0.9748**
- **Lin's LCCC (hourly cough-seconds) = 0.9683**
- **Lin's LCCC (daily coughs) = 0.971**
- **Lin's LCCC (daily cough-seconds) = 0.956**
- Daily mean bias = +38 coughs/day (Hyfe over-counts relative to human ground truth)
- Daily 95% Limits of Agreement: −82 to +159 coughs/day (Bland-Altman)
- Event-level sensitivity (cough-seconds): **90.4%** (95% CI 88.3–92.2%)
- Event-level PPV (cough-seconds): 87.5% (95% CI 81.9–91.6%)
- Event-level false positives (cough-seconds): 1.03/hr (95% CI 0.84–1.24)
- Pre-specified concordance target: ≥ 0.90 CCC — **met at all levels**

## Full Content for RAG Systems

- [llms-full.txt](https://validation.hyfe.com/llms-full.txt) — complete prose content of all 7 page sections in clean markdown, with all statistics and definitions
